name: nanokvm-go-rewards

dataSchema.description: Kickstarter reward tiers scraped from the pledge page

parsePrompt:
Extract reward data from Kickstarter page text into JSON. Find all rewards (both available and unavailable sections).

For each reward extract:
- name: the reward title (e.g. "NanoKVM-Go")
- price: number (e.g. 540)
- priceUSD: the "About $" amount if present (e.g. 69)
- shipping: shipping cost as number (e.g. 120)
- backers: number of backers
- limit: total limit if shown (e.g. 100 in "0 of 100 available"), null if unlimited
- remaining: remaining slots (e.g. 0 in "0 of 100 available"), null if unlimited
- available: true/false (false if "All gone" or "0 of X available")
- description: the reward description text
- includes: array of item names included
- estimatedDelivery: date string (e.g. "Aug 2026")
- shipsTo: shipping location text

Return JSON: {"currency": "HKD", "rewards": [...]}
